name: unreal-engine
description: Connect Artyx to Unreal Engine for editor automation, actors, Blueprints, level composition, and verification loops.

interface.shortDescription: Automate the Unreal Editor: actors, Blueprints, levels.
interface.longDescription: Operate a live Unreal Editor over MCP: spawn actors, build and compile Blueprints, compose levels, and verify every write. The bundled skill leans into list-first, compile-then-spawn discipline because UE MCP servers silently no-op more than any other DCC.
defaultPrompt: Build a small Unreal level with a floor, three lit hero actors, and a compiled BP_Spinner that rotates on Tick.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Unreal Engine
steps: Copy the UnrealMCP plugin into your project's Plugins/ folder.
Enable it in Edit → Plugins (search 'Unreal MCP'), then restart the editor.
